title: 3 things only a real brother can do for you
caption:
Most men have no one.

Not because they're unlikeable. Because nobody built it.

You've got the group chat. The guys you see at church. Maybe a cousin or two. But when something's actually wrong — when you're in the sin you can't stop, when your faith has gone quiet, when your relationship is on the edge — you go quiet too. Because nobody has permission to know.

That's not community. That's proximity.

A man of God is supposed to be known. "Confess your sins to one another, that you may be healed." — James 5:16. Not vague prayer requests. The actual thing.

Find two or three men who can look you in the eye. Give them permission. Show up for them the way you want them to show up for you.

Iron doesn't sharpen from a distance.

—

Comment "iron" and I'll send you the link to ETHOS.

#ethos #christianmen #faithoverfear #godlymen #manofgod #brotherhood #accountability #christianity #scripture #discipleship
